allow: Bash(echo -e "\\n\\n@AppRouter.post\(\\""/create-chat\\"", description=\\""创建对话式Agent\\""\)\\nasync def create_chat_agent\(\\n        data: CreateChatAgentSchema,\\n        db: AsyncSession = Depends\(db_getter\),\\n        current_user: UserModel = Depends\(get_current_user\),\\n\) -> JSONResponse:\\n    \\""\\""\\""\\""\\n    创建对话式Agent\\n    - 自动生成线性工作流: start → llm → end\\n    - 配置信息存储在顶层config字段\\n    \\""\\""\\""\\n    auth = AuthSchema\(db=db, user=current_user\)\\n    result = await AppService.create_chat_agent\(auth=auth, user=current_user, data=data\)\\n    return SuccessResponse\(\\n        data=result,\\n        msg=\\""创建成功\\""\\n    \)\\n\\n\\n@AppRouter.post\(\\""/update-chat/{id}\\"", description=\\""更新对话式Agent\\""\)\\nasync def update_chat_agent\(\\n        id: int,\\n        data: UpdateChatAgentSchema,\\n        db: AsyncSession = Depends\(db_getter\),\\n        current_user: UserModel = Depends\(get_current_user\),\\n\) -> JSONResponse:\\n    \\""\\""\\""\\""\\n    更新对话式Agent\\n    \\""\\""\\""\\n    auth = AuthSchema\(db=db, user=current_user\)\\n    result = await AppService.update_chat_agent\(auth=auth, user=current_user, app_id=id, data=data\)\\n    return SuccessResponse\(\\n        data=result,\\n        msg=\\""更新成功\\""\\n    \)\\n")
